stories.headline: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
stories.description: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday.

stories.headline: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
stories.description: Hantavirus confirmed on cruise, killing three and infecting others.

stories.headline: NATO chief says Europeans have ‘gotten the message’ from Trump on defence
stories.description: The US president has accused some NATO countries of not doing enough to support the US-Israel war on Iran.

stories.headline: ‘I can’t feel my leg’: Israeli gunfire disables teenagers in West Bank
stories.description: Al Jazeera visits refugee camp in the occupied West Bank where Israeli soldiers have killed or maimed many young people.

stories.headline: Iran war: What’s happening on day 66 as Trump announces Hormuz mission?
stories.description: Trump orders new Hormuz mission after Iran says it receives US response to its peace proposal.
